headline: Q4 Analog Semiconductors Earnings Review: First Prize Goes to Skyworks Solutions (NASDAQ:SWKS)
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how Skyworks Solutions (NASDAQ:SWKS) and the rest of the analog semiconductors stocks fared in Q4.

headline: SWKS to Showcase 6G Power Amplifier: Will its Prospects Get a Boost?
summary: Skyworks Solutions' 6G demo with MediaTek, the Qorvo deal and a new Q2 outlook could shape what is next for the chipmaker.

headline: 3 Reasons SWKS is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Skyworks Solutions has gotten torched over the last six months - since September 2025, its stock price has dropped 20.3% to $58.60 per share. This might have investors contemplating their next move.
